operative_requirement: licensing scheme made varied or revoked by order
scheme_implication: identify competent licensing authority and order maker
required_evidence: current law Bristol constitution WECA role evidence

operative_requirement: licensing scheme order requires confirmation before effect
interpretation: apparent initial England route requires Secretary of State confirmation
scheme_implication: confirm initial order submission and confirmation route

interpretation: narrow exemption not for initial order
scheme_implication: prevent misapplication to initial Bristol scheme
required_evidence: current regulation text and legal review

operative_requirement: scheme order contents include area times charges duration
interpretation: scheme design must map to order clauses

legal_source: Transport Act 2000 Schedule 12 and Net Proceeds Regulations 2003
operative_requirement: net proceeds plans programmes and accounting controls required
interpretation: financial case must reconcile gross income costs net proceeds and plans
scheme_implication: financial case must include net proceeds plans and accounting policy
required_evidence: ten year general plan five year detailed programme accounting policy

operative_requirement: WECA MCA role may affect powers assurance consent or funding
interpretation: current role unresolved and cannot be inferred from strategy
scheme_implication: WECA MCA role must be resolved before route conclusion
required_evidence: acquire current WECA MCA and Bristol governance evidence

operative_requirement: licence charge liability may sit with non-occupier parking provider where qualifying arrangements exist
interpretation: liable party cannot be assumed to be occupier in all cases
scheme_implication: licensing model must capture occupier provider arrangement and evidence
required_evidence: licence-record schema provider evidence and liability basis

operative_requirement: penalty charges may apply to unlicensed parking excess licensed places and licence-condition breach
interpretation: penalty design must map each contravention to evidence and liable party
scheme_implication: enforcement model must capture event type licensed maximum exempt vehicles and condition breach evidence

operative_requirement: penalty charge notices require prescribed content and service on liable person
interpretation: PCN templates must include amount circumstances date time payment period method representation grounds increased charge and address
scheme_implication: build PCN template and service controls before operations design
required_evidence: PCN template service policy and QA checklist

operative_requirement: representations require consideration of supporting evidence and written decision
interpretation: representation workflow is procedural fairness control
scheme_implication: operating model must capture grounds evidence decision and notice of rejection

operative_requirement: appeals are to county court and unpaid penalties may progress to charge certificate and court-order recovery
interpretation: enforcement case model must support appeal recovery and cancellation outcomes
scheme_implication: define appeals recovery and accounting procedure
required_evidence: enforcement-event schema appeals recovery fields and finance procedure

operative_requirement: notices may be served by specified methods including agreed electronic communication
interpretation: service address and communication consent must be controlled
scheme_implication: define notice service policy and evidence of service

legal_source: Road User Charging and WPL Classes of Motor Vehicles Regulations 2001
operative_requirement: vehicle classes must use specified classes and avoid incompatible mass and axle bases
interpretation: charge or exemption design by vehicle class must use statutory classes
scheme_implication: vehicle-class assumptions cannot be free text
required_evidence: vehicle class table linked to scheme order and licensing system

legal_source: Bristol governance decision notices and minutes
operative_requirement: public decision trail supports Stage One OBC development and later update-only status
interpretation: no current approval for implementation statutory consultation FBC preferred scheme boundary charge thresholds or exemptions
scheme_implication: keep scheme parameters as assumptions until later formal decision
required_evidence: decision notices minutes and future committee papers
